Excellence '''Lathe Parthenian''' was the leader of [[Libreck]] [[City/Legends|city]] and leader of the [[Hanoon Imperial Resistance]].

She and some of her team were imprisoned in an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison in their city, but were freed by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] forces while liberating the [[Hanoon|planet]].

==Personality and traits==
She was very vocal in her opposition to the Empire's tyranny, and was promptly arrested, along with several of her men, by Moff Yittreas' forces for speaking out against them.

Although modestly adept with a blaster, she appears to be reluctant about directly engaging in combat herself.

==Behind the scenes==
Lathe Parthenian is voiced by [[Kath Soucie]] in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and the ''Clone Campaigns'' expansion, where she appears in the Princess Leia campaign, and as a Hero unit for the Rebel Alliance faction. She is erroneously given the same icon as the male Hanoon Soldier unit, which also serves as a depiction of the [[Krantian/Legends|Krantian]] [[Species/Legends|species]], so her true likeness beyond her unit model is unknown.
